arts.ttl: Preview: Stoke City vs. Burnley - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Stoke City and Burnley, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Burnley manager Scott Parker issues team news ahead of Stoke City match
arts.sum: Clarets manager Scott Parker has said he has no concerns over starting veteran striker Jay Rodriguez again as he awaits the return from injury of other forwards.
